Contributions to General Provident Fund and Con- tributory Provident Fund ; (a) The Chairman and Members shall be entitled to make contributions towards General Provident Fund Account under the General Provident Fund (Central Services) Rules, 1~60 in the same manner Il~ any other Central Government servants.
